title: Load and unload competition vehicles and support equipment
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Load and unload competition vehicles and support equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare requirements for motor sport event

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from team instructions, category rules and supplementary regulations1.2 Toolboxes and storage containers are checked for completeness and security to avoid damage during transportation1.3 Additional or replacement equipment and materials are sourced as required1.4 Transporter storage area is checked and cleaned as required1.5 Straps and restraint mechanisms are checked for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from team instructions, category rules and supplementary regulations1.2 Toolboxes and storage containers are checked for completeness and security to avoid damage during transportation1.3 Additional or replacement equipment and materials are sourced as required1.4 Transporter storage area is checked and cleaned as required1.5 Straps and restraint mechanisms are checked for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from team instructions, category rules and supplementary regulations1.2 Toolboxes and storage containers are checked for completeness and security to avoid damage during transportation1.3 Additional or replacement equipment and materials are sourced as required1.4 Transporter storage area is checked and cleaned as required1.5 Straps and restraint mechanisms are checked for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare requirements for motor sport event

elements.title: Prepare competition vehicle for transportation

pcs.text: Competition vehicle is cleaned and prepared for transportation according to schedule, and electrical system is deactivated2.2 Transportation devices, components and covers are fitted2.3 Tie-down points on vehicle and transporter are identified2.4 Problems with equipment or vehicle are reported to appropriate persons as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Competition vehicle is cleaned and prepared for transportation according to schedule, and electrical system is deactivated2.2 Transportation devices, components and covers are fitted2.3 Tie-down points on vehicle and transporter are identified2.4 Problems with equipment or vehicle are reported to appropriate persons as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Competition vehicle is cleaned and prepared for transportation according to schedule, and electrical system is deactivated2.2 Transportation devices, components and covers are fitted2.3 Tie-down points on vehicle and transporter are identified2.4 Problems with equipment or vehicle are reported to appropriate persons as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare competition vehicle for transportation

elements.title: Load and secure competition vehicle and support equipment for transportation

pcs.text: Vehicle and support equipment are loaded on to transporter according to team procedures and safety requirements3.2 Vehicle and support equipment are secured according to team requirements and restraints are checked3.3 Hazardous material is stored according to safety requirements and team procedures3.4 Transporter tailgates, ramps, doors and bins are closed and secured according to safety requirements and team procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Vehicle and support equipment are loaded on to transporter according to team procedures and safety requirements3.2 Vehicle and support equipment are secured according to team requirements and restraints are checked3.3 Hazardous material is stored according to safety requirements and team procedures3.4 Transporter tailgates, ramps, doors and bins are closed and secured according to safety requirements and team procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Vehicle and support equipment are loaded on to transporter according to team procedures and safety requirements3.2 Vehicle and support equipment are secured according to team requirements and restraints are checked3.3 Hazardous material is stored according to safety requirements and team procedures3.4 Transporter tailgates, ramps, doors and bins are closed and secured according to safety requirements and team procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Load and secure competition vehicle and support equipment for transportation

elements.title: Unload vehicle and support equipment

pcs.text: Competition vehicle and support equipment are released from restraints and unloaded according to safety requirements and team procedures4.2 Transporter is cleaned and prepared for subsequent use4.3 Safety equipment is checked for currency and sufficiency, and restraint mechanisms and holding points are checked for integrity4.4 Team documentation is completed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Competition vehicle and support equipment are released from restraints and unloaded according to safety requirements and team procedures4.2 Transporter is cleaned and prepared for subsequent use4.3 Safety equipment is checked for currency and sufficiency, and restraint mechanisms and holding points are checked for integrity4.4 Team documentation is completed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Competition vehicle and support equipment are released from restraints and unloaded according to safety requirements and team procedures4.2 Transporter is cleaned and prepared for subsequent use4.3 Safety equipment is checked for currency and sufficiency, and restraint mechanisms and holding points are checked for integrity4.4 Team documentation is completed.
